description_long: This house features a low-pitched, multi-faceted hip roof with brown shingles and a prominent chimney. The exterior walls are a mix of red brick and large glass panels, with a significant portion of the structure dedicated to a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory. The house sits on a rectangular green lawn base, and one side includes a covered porch supported by white columns. The windows are expansive, especially on the front and side, allowing for ample natural light. A wooden privacy fence and paved walkway are visible, adding to the suburban residential feel.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, large glass windows, a sunroom, and a mix of brick and glass exterior, set on a green lawn with a porch and privacy fence.
description_view_0: This view highlights the glass-enclosed sunroom and the side of the house with large windows and a partial view of the porch.
description_view_1: The main facade is visible, showing the covered porch, large front windows, and the brick exterior, with the privacy fence in the background.
description_view_2: The front of the house is prominent, featuring a wide set of windows, a paved walkway, and the entry area.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the glass sunroom, the chimney, and the privacy fence, with the brick and glass materials clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and asymmetrical glass sunroom panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a paved walkway, wide steps, and a covered porch supported by white columns.
